headings: h3: Nusrat GHANI Member of Parliament for Sussex Weald
text_excerpt: Upcoming surgery | Nus Ghani Skip to main content Main navigation About Nusrat News Campaigns Media Newsletter Testimonials Visit Parliament Banking Services Survey Crowborough Training Camp Re-open Crowborough Birthing Centre Social Media Ban Survey Upcoming surgery Tweet Date Friday, 8th May 2026 Casework is undertaken daily and I can resolve your issues if you email directly on [email protected] . Surgery appointments are currently taking place in person, over the phone, or virtually. If you are interested in attending this surgery, please complete the attached surgery form and return to [email protected] . Once I have received the form, I can confirm your appointment and the specifics of the surgery, including the means by which we shall be communicating. So that I can help you as efficiently as possible with your queries and request for surgery appointments, please make sure you have included the following information in the attached form: Your name Full residential address including postcode What steps you have taken to try to resolve the problem yourself What you believe I can do to help you Any relevant paperwork For Home Office queries, please forward your Home Office correspondence ID number Attachments Attachment Size Surgery Form (14.9 KB) 14.9 KB Future Events Previous events Nusrat GHANI Member of Parliament for Sussex Weald Footer About RSS Accessibility Cookies Privacy About Nusrat In Parliament Promoted by Nusrat Ghani of 6a Amherst Road, Bexhill, TN40 1QJ.
